findings.rationale: checked toggle without controlled-onChange parity loses NormalizedPathname brand
findings.explanation: The function signature of canonicalizeURLPart returns a plain string which loses the NormalizedPathname brand applied earlier in the file. Downstream callers that consume the result must re-cast or risk a silent type-narrowing escape — the same concern surfaces in this LinkAccordion's controlled state where href is passed through without re-narrowing.
